allow: Bash(python -c 'from pydantic import BaseModel, HttpUrl; import pydantic; print\(pydantic.VERSION\); class M\(BaseModel\): url: HttpUrl *)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { 'still up' } else { 'free' })
